differential_diagnoses: Disseminated malignancy (e.g., Acute lymphoblastic leukemia or neuroblastoma)
next_steps: Bartonella henselae serology (IgM and IgG) and Bartonella PCR on peripheral blood
Biopsy of a hepatic or bone lesion for histopathology and microbial culture
Ophthalmology consultation for funduscopic exam to rule out retinitis
Complete blood count with peripheral smear and immunophenotyping
